com.example.battleship.model.player
 
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.model.player used by com.example.battleship.controller
    Class
    Description
    Player
    A participant in a game: a nickname and the Board holding their own fleet (the board the opponent shoots at).
    ShotResult
    The outcome of resolving a single shot against a Board.
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.model.player used by com.example.battleship.controller.event
    Class
    Description
    Player
    A participant in a game: a nickname and the Board holding their own fleet (the board the opponent shoots at).
    ShotResult
    The outcome of resolving a single shot against a Board.
    Turn
    Whose turn it currently is to shoot.
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.model.player used by com.example.battleship.model
    Class
    Description
    HumanPlayer
    The human player.
    MachinePlayer
    The computer-controlled opponent (HU-4).
    Player
    A participant in a game: a nickname and the Board holding their own fleet (the board the opponent shoots at).
    ShootingStrategy
    Decides where the machine player shoots next.
    ShotResult
    The outcome of resolving a single shot against a Board.
    Turn
    Whose turn it currently is to shoot.
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.model.player used by com.example.battleship.model.board
    Class
    Description
    ShotResult
    The outcome of resolving a single shot against a Board.
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.model.player used by com.example.battleship.model.player
    Class
    Description
    Player
    A participant in a game: a nickname and the Board holding their own fleet (the board the opponent shoots at).
    RandomShootingStrategy
    Picks a uniformly random cell, among the ones not shot at yet, on every call -- the machine-player behavior required by HU-4.
    ShootingStrategy
    Decides where the machine player shoots next.
    ShotResult
    The outcome of resolving a single shot against a Board.
    Turn
    Whose turn it currently is to shoot.
